name: ctm360-cyna
label: CTM360 CYNA
description: This connector allows FortiSOAR to pull cyber news from the CTM360 platform to keep security teams informed of the latest threat intelligence.

fields.title: Server URL
fields.name: server
fields.tooltip: Provide a server URL of the CyNA server to which the connector will connect to perform automated operations.
fields.description: Provide a server URL of the CyNA server to which the connector will connect to perform automated operations.

fields.title: API Key
fields.name: api_key
fields.tooltip: Provide the API key configured for your CyNA server, which will be used to connect and perform automated operations.
fields.description: Provide the API key configured for your CyNA server, which will be used to connect and perform automated operations.

fields.title: Verify SSL
fields.name: verify_ssl
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. By default, this option is set as True.
fields.description: Specifies whether the SSL certificate for the server is to be verified or not. By default, this option is set as True.

operations.title: Get Cyber News
operations.description: Retrieves the latest cyber news articles and threat intelligence updates from the CTM360 CyNA platform.

parameters.title: Search After
parameters.name: search_after
parameters.description: Continuation token used to fetch the next set of articles. This will be returned in the response if more articles are available
parameters.tooltip: Continuation token used to fetch the next set of articles. This will be returned in the response if more articles are available

parameters.title: Fields
parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specify a comma-separated list of fields you want return in the connector action response.
parameters.tooltip: Specify a comma-separated list of fields you want return in the connector action response.

parameters.title: Start Date
parameters.name: start_date
parameters.tooltip: Select a start date and time from which cyber news articles should be retrieved.
parameters.description: Select a start date and time from which cyber news articles should be retrieved.

parameters.title: End Date
parameters.name: end_date
parameters.tooltip: Select a end date and time up to which cyber news articles should be retrieved.
parameters.description: Select a end date and time up to which cyber news articles should be retrieved.

parameters.title: Size
parameters.name: size
parameters.tooltip: Specifies the number of cyber news articles to retrieve. The maximum allowed value is 100.
parameters.description: Specifies the number of cyber news articles to retrieve. The maximum allowed value is 100.

parameters.title: Offset
parameters.name: search_after
parameters.description: Use the continuation token provided in the previous response to retrieve the next batch of articles, if available.
parameters.tooltip: Use the continuation token provided in the previous response to retrieve the next batch of articles, if available.
